ddls:
CREATE TABLE "islands" (
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each island */,
  "island_name" TEXT /* Name of the island */,
  "acreage" REAL /* Acreage of the island */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the island is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the island */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the island */,
  "large_acreage" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island has a large acreage */,
  "ocean_island" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island is an ocean island */,
  "income_potential" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island has income potential */,
  "mainland_power" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island has mainland power */,
  "islands_with_beaches" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island has beaches */,
  "turn_key" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island is turn-key */,
  "airstrip_or_fly_in" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island has an airstrip or fly-in */,
  "income_producing" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island is income producing */,
  "lake_island" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island is a lake island */,
  "seasonal" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island is seasonal */,
  "historic" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island is historic */,
  "river_island" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island is a river island */,
  "mainland_lot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the island has a mainland lot */,
  "nearest_city" TEXT /* Nearest city to the island */,
  "city_distance" REAL /* Distance to the nearest city */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the island */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the island */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities (e.g., swimming pool, private beach, spa) */,
  "photos_url" TEXT /* URLs of photos of the island */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a promotional video */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("island_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_islands_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the agent belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Agent's real estate license number */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "preferred_communication_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Client interests (e.g., beach, mountains, historic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* ID of the island being listed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the listing */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date the listing was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  "listing_type" TEXT /* Type of listing (e.g., for sale, for rent) */,
  "listing_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  "price_history" TEXT /* Historical price changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_island_id FOREIGN KEY ("island_id") REFERENCES islands ("island_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "showings" (
  "showing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each showing */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being shown */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client attending the showing */,
  "showing_date" TEXT /* Date the showing occurred */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the client after the showing */,
  "showing_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the showing */,
  "showing_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the showing */,
  "agent_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the agent about the showing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("showing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_showings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_showings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being offered on */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the offer */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the offer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "offer_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the offer (e.g., subject to inspection) */,
  "offer_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being sold */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client buying the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was finalized */,
  "closing_documents_url" TEXT /* URL to the closing documents */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* ID of the island being maintained */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance service occurred */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance service (e.g., landscaping, repairs) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance service */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "next_scheduled_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled service */,
  "service_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_island_id FOREIGN KEY ("island_id") REFERENCES islands ("island_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)
